stops.title: Garden-road threshold
stops.summary: Begin at the safe point and follow the central route into the tree-lined villa district.

stops.title: Mixed-villa intersection
stops.summary: Read the varied low-rise silhouettes as an authored cross-section of Badaguan’s garden-villa character.

stops.title: Public green heart
stops.summary: Pause where planted routes open into a shared green space before the path turns uphill.

stops.title: Princess-inspired composition
stops.summary: Look for the pine-green Nordic and crafted-window cues within an interpretive, non-replica composition.

stops.title: Butterfly-inspired composition
stops.summary: The route next frames authored Mansard and brick-timber cues associated with the landmark family.

stops.title: Shore and Huashi-inspired vista
stops.summary: Finish with a framed sea view and a compact castle-like shore composition before returning to the safe point.
